disagreement_signals: No child supported restoring the original subsystem verbatim.
All children agreed the efficiency objective is real but the original framing is obsolete under current authority.

parent_synthesis.consensus: reject original form and preserve only the scale-separation objective in a subordinate internal redesign
parent_synthesis.strongest_salvage_path: Sovereign Inference Fabric or Model Capacity and Placement Control Plane under C45 and C47
parent_synthesis.operator_facing_recommendation: Do not add the original subsystem back as written.

recommended_parent_actions: Present 3-4 ideation options to the operator and stop for choice.
If the operator wants promotion, narrow the concept before any research stage.
